data.title: UPDATE test: harvest-worktree.sh reads PRECONDITIONS via _read_latest_preconditions
data.description:
## Testing Mode
UPDATE

## Story
0263-62ba — Migrate 4 consumers to PRECONDITIONS, add compaction on epic-closure with ordering contract

## Objective
Update existing harvest-worktree tests to assert that harvest-worktree.sh reads PRECONDITIONS events via `_read_latest_preconditions()` and logs the summary. Also assert no behavioral regression on tickets with zero PRECONDITIONS events. Tests must fail RED before harvest-worktree.sh is updated.

## Existing Test File to Modify
- `tests/scripts/test-harvest-worktree.sh` — add 2 test functions

## .test-index RED markers required
- `plugins/dso/scripts/harvest-worktree.sh: tests/scripts/test-harvest-worktree.sh [test_harvest_reads_preconditions_summary]`
- `plugins/dso/scripts/harvest-worktree.sh: tests/scripts/test-harvest-worktree.sh [test_harvest_preconditions_zero_events_no_regression]`

## Test Approach (Given/When/Then)

**test_harvest_reads_preconditions_summary:**
- Given: a git repo with a worktree branch; ticket has PRECONDITIONS events with gate_verdicts; gate artifacts (test-gate-status passed, review-status passed) exist
- When: `harvest-worktree.sh <branch> <artifacts_dir> --ticket-id <ticket_id>` runs
- Then: stderr output contains `[harvest] preconditions: manifest_depth=` (or equivalent summary line); exit 0; merge succeeds

**test_harvest_preconditions_zero_events_no_regression:**
- Given: same setup but ticket has zero PRECONDITIONS event files (legacy ticket)
- When: `harvest-worktree.sh` runs
- Then: exit 0; no crash; no error about missing PRECONDITIONS; stderr contains `[harvest] preconditions: pre-manifest` or similar graceful message

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `test_harvest_reads_preconditions_summary` added to test-harvest-worktree.sh
  Verify: grep -q "test_harvest_reads_preconditions_summary" tests/scripts/test-harvest-worktree.sh
- [ ] `test_harvest_preconditions_zero_events_no_regression` added to test-harvest-worktree.sh
  Verify: grep -q "test_harvest_preconditions_zero_events_no_regression" tests/scripts/test-harvest-worktree.sh
- [ ] Both new tests fail RED (harvest not yet updated)
  Verify: bash tests/scripts/test-harvest-worktree.sh test_harvest_reads_preconditions_summary 2>&1 | grep -qiE "FAIL|not found"
- [ ] .test-index updated with RED markers for both tests
  Verify: grep -c '\[test_harvest_reads_preconditions_summary\]' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index
- [ ] All pre-existing harvest-worktree tests still pass
  Verify: bash tests/scripts/test-harvest-worktree.sh 2>&1 | grep -E "^FAIL" | grep -v "test_harvest_.*preconditions" | wc -l | awk '{exit ($1 > 0)}'

## Retry Budget
MAX_ATTEMPTS: 3 (sonnet model)
On 3 consecutive sonnet failures: escalate to opus with full diagnostic context (all 3 failure messages)
On 3 consecutive opus failures (6 total): escalate to user with full failure history
If MAX_AGENTS: 0 at sonnet→opus escalation time: skip opus step, escalate to user immediately
